version:
show system version | no-more

System Name: NCP3-nog
Version: DNOS [26.2.0] build [22_priv], Copyright 2026 DRIVENETS LTD.
Patch: N/A

NCP3-nog#
step1_before_config:
show config interfaces ge400-0/0/3.1 | no-more

# NCP3-nog config-start [08-Apr-2026 23:52:33 UTC]

interfaces
  ge400-0/0/3.1
    admin-state enabled
    ipv4-address 10.1.1.1/24
    ipv6-address 2001:db8:1::1/64
    l2-service disabled
    vlan-id 1
    urpf
      admin-state enabled
      mode strict
      address-family ipv4
        admin-state enabled
        mode strict
      !
      address-family ipv6
        admin-state enabled
        mode strict
      !
    !
  !
!

# NCP3-nog config-end

NCP3-nog#
step1_output:
commit
NOTICE: commit action is not applicable. no configuration changes were made
NCP3-nog(cfg)#
